summary: Surah Al-Ahqaf emphasizes the truth of the Qur’an and the reality of resurrection. It refutes idolatry and recounts the fate of the people of A’ad who denied their prophet. The surah highlights the importance of gratitude to parents, steadfastness in faith, and the ranks of people according to their deeds. It describes the jinn listening to the Qur’an, calls to heed Allah’s warnings, and reminds of the consequences of disbelief and arrogance.
